description: [kill] - Send a signal to a process. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Send SIGTERM (15) to process ID 1234 (graceful stop)
commands.explanation: Executes the kill routine logically to process: send sigterm (15) to process id 1234 (graceful stop)

commands.description: Send SIGKILL (9) to gracefully force stop a process
commands.explanation: Executes the kill routine logically to process: send sigkill (9) to gracefully force stop a process

commands.description: Send SIGHUP (1) to restart/reload the process
commands.explanation: Executes the kill routine logically to process: send sighup (1) to restart/reload the process
